mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.username, t.title as thingTitle, t.cover, CONCAT(ts.start_time, '-', ts.end_time) as slotTime FROM b_appointment a LEFT JOIN b_user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN b_thing t ON a.thing_id = t.id LEFT JOIN b_time_slot ts ON a.slot_id = ts.slot_id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, t.title as thingTitle, t.cover, CONCAT(ts.start_time, '-', ts.end_time) as slotTime FROM b_appointment a LEFT JOIN b_thing t ON a.thing_id = t.id LEFT JOIN b_time_slot ts ON a.slot_id = ts.slot_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, u.username, t.title as thingTitle, t.cover, CONCAT(ts.start_time, '-', ts.end_time) as slotTime FROM b_appointment a LEFT JOIN b_user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN b_thing t ON a.thing_id = t.id LEFT JOIN b_time_slot ts ON a.slot_id = ts.slot_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
